segments.text: I'd like to reach Diamond, but
segments.original_text: ダイヤにね到達したいところではあるんですけれども

segments.text: the moment you show even the slightest opening, H.O punishes you
segments.original_text: このね少しでも隙を見せるとマイルドなH.Oに

full_text: I'd like to reach Diamond, but the moment you show even the slightest opening, H.O punishes you and you get beaten, so you gotta be careful
